commands.review_summary:
The PR removes bundled GitHub Copilot model catalog rows and static metadata overrides so live `/models` discovery or explicit user configuration supplies model visibility and metadata.

PR surface: Source -254, Tests -25. Total -279 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source and tests define the bundled fallback for disabled or failed discovery, while the linked real-account evidence demonstrates that the live endpoint contains newer entitlement metadata missing from static rows.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocking fallback regression has a concrete repair that can preserve most of the branch while aligning it with the linked issue.

target.title: fix(github-copilot): prefer live model catalog
target.author: saju01
